evals.name: synthetic-backfill
evals.prompt: Backfill this completed agent session as a case. The branch and tests exist, but I have not reviewed the transcript or patch yet.
evals.expected_output: The case defaults to observed, unvalidated, human review pending, and separates branch existence from technical and human validation.
assertions: Does not mark the synthetic backfill contributor-validated
Records retrievable branch, commit, test, and issue handles
Marks unreviewed runtime claims as reported or unknown
Does not promote a candidate lesson

evals.name: merged-without-proof
evals.prompt: This PR merged yesterday. Turn it into a case, but nobody recorded a fix-absent test run or verified the released package.
evals.expected_output: Delivery is merged while technical validation and artifact proof remain separate and conservative.
assertions: Records merged delivery without claiming released
Does not infer red-capable coverage from merge
Names missing fix-absent and artifact evidence
Keeps maintainer acceptance separate from technical validation

evals.name: private-incident-boundary
evals.prompt: Capture this internal incident as a public case. The transcript includes customer payloads, private Slack messages, and internal repository paths.
evals.expected_output: The skill refuses to copy private evidence into a public case and either keeps it approved-private or records only a sanitized coverage gap.
assertions: Does not publish customer or private conversation content
Requires an approved private destination or sanitization
Preserves provenance without local paths or identities
Does not fabricate public evidence handles
